ref_classifications.reason: Problem 14.6 cites Table 12.5, but chapter 12 in this source only contains internal tables 12.1 through 12.4.
ref_classifications.evidence: Raw PDF p.495 shows problem 14.6 ending with 'Note: see Table 12.5.' Raw PDF p.407 and the parsed/catalog data for chapter 12 show the nickel-base diffusion table as Table 12.4, with no Table 12.5 anywhere in chapter 12.

ref_classifications.reason: The X2.1 reference is to ASTM Standard A255, not to an internal table in this book.
ref_classifications.evidence: The Table 19.5 block footnote reads '*Abstracted from ASTM Standard A255, Table X2.1.' This explicitly identifies Table X2.1 as an external ASTM source table rather than a catalogable table in this book.
